hero.description: Héctor Severino provides industrial-grade turbochargers and components for heavy-duty performance. Built for reliability, delivered with expertise.

categories.title: Industrial
categories.description: Comprehensive solutions for heavy machinery turbo systems and mechanical maintenance.
categories.turbochargersDesc: Complete units for CAT, Komatsu, and Volvo.
categories.engineeringDesc: Dynamic balancing, technical diagnostics, and performance optimization for heavy-duty turbines.

restoration.title: ELITE
restoration.description: Don't replace when you can restore to OEM specifications. Our specialized workshop uses aerospace-grade balancing and ultrasonic cleaning to give your turbines a second life.

aboutPage.title: ABOUT US
aboutPage.subtitle: PRECISION. RELIABILITY. EXCELLENCE.
aboutPage.description: Héctor Severino - Grupo Turbos y Repuestos is a leading provider of high-performance turbochargers and precision components for industrial, marine, and heavy machinery applications. With decades of technical expertise, we ensure your operations never stop.

mission.title: OUR MISSION
mission.text: To deliver engineering solutions that exceed OEM standards, maximizing the efficiency and lifespan of every industrial engine we touch.

quality.title: AEROSPACE PRECISION
quality.text: We apply the highest standards of balancing and tolerance in every component.

reliability.title: UNWAVERING RELIABILITY
reliability.text: Built for the toughest environments, our parts are tested for extreme performance.

innovation.title: CONTINUOUS INNOVATION
innovation.text: From advanced restoration techniques to next-gen components, we lead the industry.
